title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Carrot as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, to be exact, it was an imposter impersonating you who tagged along with us as we repeatedly made futile attempts to escape from this forest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then, out of the blue, the imposter transformed into this huge woman, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a look at the scar on my face...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the thing is, whenever I see such flawless, alluring faces...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm over- come with the urge to slice them up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who knows... but chances are he's probably lost somewhere deep inside this forest by now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Carrot's fist shot out of that mirror thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am... a "mirror"!! A mirror human who ate the mirror mirror fruit*!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just as a mirror reflects all the light cast upon it,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you try to punch my mirror, it'll simply reflect that blow right back at you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll just shatter that stupid mirror of yours into pieces!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 29 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
